author: The Defold Foundation
description: Official Defold native extension for FMOD sound engine bindings. FMOD is a proprietary sound effects engine and authoring tool for video games and applications, that play and mix sounds of diverse formats on many operating systems. Defold FMOD exposes FMOD Studio and Core API to Lua for events, banks, buses, VCAs, runtime parameters, low-level audio, and 3D spatial audio. Commercial usage of FMOD products may require a separate license directly with Firelight Technologies. For details refer to fmod.com/resources/eula. According to the FMOD license, you must credit FMOD in your project's documentation, or in an on screen format. The text should include at least the words "FMOD" (OR "FMOD STUDIO" IF APPLICABLE) AND "FIRELIGHT TECHNOLOGIES".
name: Defold FMOD

releases.message:
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/FMOD-2.03.09-green)
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Emscripten-4.0.6+3.1.67-green)

## What's New

The bridge-to-extension transition from alpha.2 is complete. The build tooling moved to a single Python script (`cicd/build.py`) that handles bindings generation, tests, and FMOD updates. The rest is bug fixes and trimming leftover bridge logic.

The [extension manual](https://defold.com/extension-fmod) was rewritten with images and a step-by-step walkthrough, and the [API reference](https://defold.com/extension-fmod/fmod_api/) is generating a more humanized description from the parsed API.

* **Added** arm64-linux support
* **Fixed** Windows crash on bundled builds ([#29](https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/issues/29))
* **Fixed** `get_sync_point_info` off-by-one argument ([#49](https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/issues/49))
* **Fixed** prints swapped for proper dmLog calls ([#55](https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/issues/55))
* **Fixed** path getter resolution ([#58](https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/issues/58))
* Removed unnecessary resources folder, cleaned up no-op ensure, dropped old autocomplete workaround

## Platforms

macOS, iOS (arm64, x86_64-simulator), Android (arm64, armv7), Windows (x86, x86_64), Linux (x86_64, arm64), HTML5 (js-web, wasm-web, wasm_pthread-web)

## Updates

* #29 - Crash On Windows Build → https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/pull/33
* #34 - Remove unnecessary resources → https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/pull/35

* #51 - Clean no-op ensure → https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/pull/53

* #52 - Fix #52 → https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/pull/54

* #60 - Better Script API, Introduction, Images → https://github.com/defold/extension-fmod/pull/61
